description: The first public video of the alleged use of a Ukrainian-made guided air bomb "Equalizer" has appeared. The Defense Express publication previously wrote that the first such bombs had already been handed over to the military, and serial production had also begun. The "leveler" weighs 250 kg and can be launched from aircraft at a range of 10 to 130+ km. The maximum range is possible only when reset with a large...
description_en: The first public video of the alleged use of a Ukrainian-made guided air bomb "Equalizer" has appeared. The Defense Express publication previously wrote that the first such bombs had already been handed over to the military, and serial production had also begun. The "leveler" weighs 250 kg and can be launched from aircraft at a range of 10 to 130+ km. The maximum range is possible only when reset with a large...
description_uk: Появилось первое публичное видео, как утверждается, применения управляемой авиабомбы украинского производства "Вирівнювач" Издание Defense Express ранее писало, что первые такие бомбы уже передали военным, а также началось серийное производство. "Вирівнювач" весит 250 кг и может запускаться с самолетов на дальность от 10 до 130+ км. Максимальная дальность возможна только при сбросе с большой...

title: Kyiv: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2...
title_en: Kyiv: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2...
title_uk: Київ: Україна повернула 42 дитини з окупованої РФ території за 2...
description: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2 weeks. "Thousands of children remain trapped under occupation, where they are forced to forget their roots and are openly being prepared for war. But we will not stop," Save Ukraine, a Ukrainian humanitarian NGO, said in a June 23 statement on social media.
description_en: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2 weeks. "Thousands of children remain trapped under occupation, where they are forced to forget their roots and are openly being prepared for war. But we will not stop," Save Ukraine, a Ukrainian humanitarian NGO, said in a June 23 statement on social media.

title: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_uk: Він провів зустріч з Генеральним секретарем Організації з...
description: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_uk: Провів зустріч із генеральним секретарем Організації економічного співробітництва та розвитку Матіасом Корманом. Членство України в ОЕСР для нас дуже важливе. І сьогодні робимо крок в цьому напрямі: Прем’єр-міністр передала ОЕСР офіційну поновлену заявку України на членство. Сподіваємось отримати статус країни-кандидата вже цієї осені. Наступний етап – дорожня карта до членства в ОЕСР. Обговорили...

title: Kyiv: Ukraine detains suspected intermediary in alleged Russian-backed plot...

description: Ukraine detains suspected intermediary in alleged Russian-backed plot to assassinate military intelligence official. According to the Prosecutor General's Office, the newly identified suspect, a 34-year-old former serviceman, acted as a middleman between the organizers and the suspected hitman.

According to the Prosecutor General's Office, the newly identified suspect, a 34-year-old former serviceman, acted as a middleman between the organizers and the suspected hitman.

title: Kyiv: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia...
title_en: Kyiv: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia...
title_uk: Київ: щонайменше 26 небойових смертей, ймовірні зловживання в Скелі...
description: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia assault regiment, Ukrainian media investigation finds. The deaths, which occurred shortly after mobilization and training, have prompted allegations from relatives and former servicemen of inadequate medical care and, in some cases, physical abuse within the unit.
description_en: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia assault regiment, Ukrainian media investigation finds. The deaths, which occurred shortly after mobilization and training, have prompted allegations from relatives and former servicemen of inadequate medical care and, in some cases, physical abuse within the unit.

title: The fuel crisis has reached the main oil region of the Russian...
title_en: The fuel crisis has reached the main oil region of the Russian...
title_uk: Паливна криза дісталася до головного нафтового регіону Росії...
description: The fuel crisis has reached the main oil region of the Russian Federation, - rosSMY In the Khanty-Mansiysk Autonomous Okrug, where about 40% of Russian oil is produced, restrictions on the sale of fuel have been introduced. At gas stations of one of the largest chains, they now dispense no more than 40 liters of gasoline and 80 liters of diesel per person. Similar measures are already in place in more than 50 regions of the Russian Federation, including Omsk, Irkutsk,...
description_en: The fuel crisis has reached the main oil region of the Russian Federation, - rosSMY In the Khanty-Mansiysk Autonomous Okrug, where about 40% of Russian oil is produced, restrictions on the sale of fuel have been introduced. At gas stations of one of the largest chains, they now dispense no more than 40 liters of gasoline and 80 liters of diesel per person. Similar measures are already in place in more than 50 regions of the Russian Federation, including Omsk, Irkutsk,...
description_uk: Топливный кризис добрался до главного нефтяного региона рф, - росСМИ В Ханты-Мансийском автономном округе, где добывается около 40% российской нефти, ввели ограничения на продажу топлива. На заправках одной из крупнейших сетей теперь отпускают не более 40 литров бензина и 80 литров дизеля на человека. Аналогичные меры уже действуют более чем в 50 регионах рф, включая Омскую, Иркутскую,...

description: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center "Alpha" of the Security Service of Ukraine, and I am grateful to you for the fact that every year you add strength to the Center, the Security Service of Ukraine, and our entire state. Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_en: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center "Alpha" of the Security Service of Ukraine, and I am grateful to you for the fact that every year you add strength to the Center, the Security Service of Ukraine, and our entire state. Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_uk: Сьогодні вже 32 роки Центру спеціальних операцій «Альфа» Служби безпеки України, і я вдячний вам за те, що кожного року ви додаєте сили і Центру, і Службі безпеки України, і всій нашій державі. Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів ЦСО «А» СБУ та передав нагороду родині загиблого Героя, удостоєного цього звання посмертно. A railway bridge across the North Crimean Canal, fuel facilities, and military infrastructure across occupied Crimea were struck in a large-scale overnight Ukrainian operation, Ukrainian military officials said on June 23.

description_en: 👀 The Russians are throwing up new targets for good drones: from June 23, they will be allowed to transport up to 200 liters of fuel in one car along the Krymsky bridge, - reports the occupation headquarters. description_uk: 👀 Россияне подкидывают новые цели для добрых дронов: с 23 июня по Крымскому мосту разрешат перевозить до 200 литров топлива в одной машине, - сообщает оккупационный оперштаб ▶️ К слову, прямо сейчас на нашем YouTube-канале идет эфир об изоляции Крыма, Крымском мосте и логистике полуострова. Гость эфира - председатель Меджлиса крымскотатарского народа Рефат Чубаров. Подключайтесь.

description: 118 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 23 (from 18:00 on June 22), the enemy attacked 135 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Kursk, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk, Millerovo - Russian Federation The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile fire...
description_en: 118 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 23 (from 18:00 on June 22), the enemy attacked 135 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Kursk, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk, Millerovo - Russian Federation The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile fire...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 118 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 23 червня (з 18:00 22 червня) противник атакував 135 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Орел, Курськ, Брянськ, Приморсько-Ахтарськ, Міллерово – рф. Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем, мобільні вогневі...
